rules.title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr, with limit on monetary assets
rules.failReason: net_tangible_assets_failReason

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: operating_profits_failReason

rules.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: net_worth_failReason

rules.title: Application for in-principle approval
Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
Dematerialised form of promoter's securities
rules.failReason: fun i => "Promoters' securities not in dematerialised form."

rules.title: Fully paid-up equity shares or forfeiture
rules.failReason: fun i => "Existing partly paid-up equity shares not fully paid-up or forfeited."

rules.title: Firm arrangements of finance
rules.failReason: fun i => "Firm arrangements of finance for less than 75% of the project's funding."

rules.title: Minimum holding period for equity shares offered for sale
rules.failReason: fun i => "Equity shares offered for sale not held for at least one year."

rules.title: Holding period for convertible securities and resulting equity shares
rules.failReason: fun i => "Convertible securities and resulting equity shares not held for at least one year."

rules.title: Max sale of equity shares for unidentified targets
rules.failReason: fun i => "Maximum sale exceeded 25%.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Exceptions to max sale for general corporate purposes
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No specific disclosures about acquisitions or investments were made."

rules.title: Additional conditions for conversion of compulsorily convertible securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Convertible securities issued from revaluation reserves or unrealized profits."

rules.title: Issuer may issue convertible debt instruments without prior equity IPO
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer is in default of payment or repayment for more than six months."

rules.title: Credit rating required for CDI offer
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No credit rating obtained from any agency."

rules.title: Default payment of interest or repayment of principal
rules.failReason: fun i => "Issuer is in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for a period of more than six months.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Credit rating and debenture trustee requirements
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if not i.credit_rating.isSome then "Issuer has not obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency."
                                        else if i.debenture_trustee.isEmpty then "Issuer has not appointed at least one debenture trustee.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Debenture redemption reserve
rules.failReason: fun i => "Issuer has not created a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Consent for conversion of convertible debt instruments
rules.failReason: fun i => "Issuer has not obtained positive consent from holders for the conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Option to not convert convertible portion into equity shares
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if (i.convertible_debt_value <= 10000000) then "The value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer is less than ten crore rupees."
                                                   else if not i.option_not_convert.isSome then "Holders of such convertible debt instruments have not been given the option of not converting the convertible portion into equity shares.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Warrant tenure ≤ 18 months
rules.failReason:
fun i => s!"Warrant tenure exceeds 18 months. Tenure: {i.warrant_tenure}",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Warrant exercise price formula and upfront payment
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if not i.warrant_exercise_price.isSome then s!"Warrant exercise price is missing."
      else if not (i.upfront_payment > (25 / 100) * i.warrant_exercise_price.get) then s!"Upfront payment should be at least 25% of the consideration amount based on the exercise price.",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Forfeiture of consideration for un-exercised warrants
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      if i.warrant_tenure > 3 * 12 then s!"Warrant tenure exceeds 3 months."
      else if i.warrant_exercise_price.isSome && i.upfront_payment == 0 then s!"Upfront payment should be received for un-exercised warrants.",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20%
rules.failReason:
fun i => s!"Promoters' contribution is less than 20%. Contribution: {i.promoter_contribution}",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Promoter contribution by equity shares or convertible securities
rules.failReason:
fun i => s!"Contribution method is missing.",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Undisclosed conversion price
rules.failReason: fun i => "Promoter contribution not specified in the offer document."

rules.title: Promoters' contribution computation
rules.check: fun i => (i.promoter_contribution_computation_method.length == 2) && i.promoter_contribution_computation_method.all (fun x => x.1 == "post-issue expanded capital" && (x.2 == "full proposed conversion of convertible securities into equity shares" || x.2 == "exercise of all vested options, where any employee stock options or stock appreciation rights are outstanding at the time of initial public offer in terms of proviso (a) to sub-regulation (2) of regulation 5"))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Incorrect promoters' contribution computation method."

rules.title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.check: fun i => (i.securities_ineligible.length > 0) && i.securities_ineligible.all (fun x => x >= 1 && x <= 3)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Incorrect number of ineligible securities."

rules.title: Promoters’ contribution computation
rules.check: fun i => i.promoter_contribution_computation_method.all (fun x => x.1 == "post-issue expanded capital")
rules.failReason: fun i => "Incorrect promoters' contribution computation method."

rules.title: Exercise of employee stock options or SARs
rules.failReason: fun i => "No assumption made for exercising employee stock options or SARs."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired by promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.promoter_payments.exists (λ p, p.securities == x && p.price < i.issue_price))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Promoters paid more than issue price for some specified securities.", remedy? := some "Ensure promoters pay the issue price for all specified securities."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired under Companies Act
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.companies_act_approvals.exists (λ a, a.securities == x && a.price < i.issue_price) && i.promoter_investments.exists (λ p, p.time > 1 && p.year <= a.year))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Promoters did not invest for more than one year prior to approval or specified securities were not acquired under Companies Act.", remedy? := some "Ensure promoters invested business and capital that had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to such approval."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities in government company IPO
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.government_ipos.exists (λ g, g.securities == x))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Initial public offer was not by a government company, statutory authority or corporation or any special purpose vehicle set up by any of them, engaged in the infrastructure sector.", remedy? := some "Ensure initial public offer is made by a government company, statutory authority or corporation."

rules.title: Specified securities allotted to promoters at a price less than issue price
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.all (fun x => i.promoter_transactions.exists (λ t, t.securities == x && t.price < i.issue_price) && t.time <= 1)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities were not allotted to promoters at a price less than the issue price within the preceding one year.", remedy? := some "Ensure specified securities are allotted to promoters at a price less than the issue price during the preceding one year."

rules.title: Lock-in of specified securities held by the promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.securities_held_by_promoters.all (fun x => i.lock_in_periods.exists (λ p, p.securities == x && p.time <= p.end))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities held by promoters are transferable outside the lock-in period.", remedy? := some "Ensure specified securities held by promoters are not transferable during the lock-in period."

rules.title: Promoter lock-in period (18 months)
rules.check:
fun i => match i.lock_in_period with
                        some 18 => True
                      | _ => False
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.lock_in_period.isSome then "Lock-in period should be 18 for promoter contribution." else "Missing lock-in period for promoter contribution.",
    remedy? := some "Specify the lock-in period of 18 months for promoter contribution."

rules.title: Promoter excess holding lock-in (6 months)
rules.check:
fun i => match i.lock_in_period with
                        some 6 => True
                      | _ => False
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.lock_in_period.isSome then "Lock-in period should be 6 for promoter excess holding." else "Missing lock-in period for promoter excess holding.",
    remedy? := some "Specify the lock-in period of 6 months for promoter excess holding."

rules.title: Other persons' lock-in (6 months)
rules.check:
fun i => match i.lock_in_period with
                        some x => x == 6
                      | _ => False
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.lock_in_period.isSome then "Lock-in period should be 6 for equity shares held by persons other than promoters." else "Missing lock-in period for equity shares held by persons other than promoters.",
    remedy? := some "Specify the lock-in period of 6 months for equity shares held by persons other than promoters."

rules.title: Venture capital funds' lock-in (6 months)
rules.check:
fun i => match i.lock_in_period with
                        some x => x == 6
                      | _ => False
rules.failReason:
fun i => if i.lock_in_period.isSome then "Lock-in period should be 6 for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds." else "Missing lock-in period for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds.",
    remedy? := some "Specify the lock-in period of 6 months for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (a)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) && i.issuer_or_subsidiary && i.loan_for_issue_financing
rules.failReason: fun i => if !i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 then "Need locked-in specified securities." else if !i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) then "All locked-in specified securities must be non-zero." else if !i.issuer_or_subsidiary then "Loan granted to issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) is required." else if !i.loan_for_issue_financing then "Loan was not granted for the purpose of financing one or more of the objects of the issue."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (b)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) && i.loan_terms
rules.failReason: fun i => if !i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 then "Need locked-in specified securities." else if !i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) then "All locked-in specified securities must be non-zero." else if !i.loan_terms then "Pledge of specified securities is not one of the terms of sanction of the loan."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) && !i.sr_equity_shares
rules.failReason: fun i => if !i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 then "Need locked-in specified securities." else if !i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x != 0) then "All locked-in specified securities must be non-zero." else if i.sr_equity_shares then "SR equity shares are excluded from pledging."

rules.title: Transfer of locked-in specified securities
rules.failReason: fun i => "Provisions for transfer of locked-in specified securities are subject to other SEBI regulations. No check provided."

rules.title: Rights, obligations and responsibilities of lead managers
rules.failReason: fun i => if !i.lead_manager_roles.isDefined then "Lead manager roles are not predetermined and disclosed."

issuer_questions.question: What is the net tangible assets of the company?
What percentage of net tangible assets are held in monetary assets?
Provide the operating profits for the last three years.
What is the net worth of the company for the last three years?
Has the issuer defaulted on payment of interest or principal for more than six months?
Has the issuer obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency?
Who are the debenture trustees appointed by the issuer in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993?
Has the issuer created a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder?
Has the issuer obtained positive consent from holders for the conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares?
What is the total value (in rupees) of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer?
Have you disclosed the promoter contribution in the offer document?
How is the promoters' contribution computed?
Which securities are not eligible for minimum promoters’ contribution?
Have you made an assumption for exercising employee stock options or SARs?
What are the specified securities?
Were payments made for specified securities by promoters?
Were specified securities acquired under Companies Act?
Was the initial public offer a government company IPO?
Did promoters acquire specified securities at a price less than issue price?
What are the specified securities held by promoters?
What is the lock-in period in months?
Enter the number of locked-in specified securities.
Is this issue related to SR equity shares?
